code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test10-FEB-2022Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mild hypoglycemia and low HbA1c, suggesting possible recurrent low blood glucose. Elevated creatinine and significant proteinuria indicate impaired renal function, possibly nephropathy. Urine is cloudy, brown, with low specific gravity, glucosuria, ketonuria, and bilirubinuria, but no infection markers. Findings are suggestive of renal dysfunction, possibly secondary to metabolic or systemic disease; further nephrological and metabolic evaluation is recommended.
